source: docs/NAVIGATION_MODEL.json + direct Angular source analysis (message-wizard-base.component.ts, message-wizard.component.ts, wizard.shared.service.ts)

context.note: Wizard operates within the authenticated user's current profile context. No selector shown. Profile roles determine which recipient-selection options are visible.

state.note: WizardSharedService holds all wizard state in Angular. NOT persisted to server during flow — only submitted at confirm. Exception: ?smsGroupId= seeds state from server (edit/resend). State lost on browser refresh.
state.blazor_implication: Implement as scoped Blazor service (MessageWizardState). On refresh without smsGroupId: redirect to /broadcasting.

navigation.deep_link_exception: ?smsGroupId=X — seeds state from server, then allows direct step URL

variants.name: message-wizard-scheduled
variants.note: Scheduled broadcast. write-message replaced by write-scheduled-message.

variants.name: message-wizard-stencil
variants.note: Create reusable stencil. isCreatingStencil=true changes confirm submit behavior.

state_flags.hideAddressesStep: sendMethod=BySmsLogs OR sendMethod=ByStdReceivers (address selection node not rendered)

nodes.note: User selects HOW to define recipients. Options are role-filtered.

nodes.entry_condition: canSelectStdReceivers=true AND selected option is NOT std-receivers/std-receivers-ext
nodes.note: Allows adding std-receiver groups on top of address-based selection.
Compose message: text, subject, channels (SMS/email/eBoks/voice), templates, merge fields.

variant_override.message-wizard-scheduled: replaced by write-scheduled-message node (adds scheduling: date/time, recurrence)

nodes.note: Read-only summary: recipients + message. Map preview if by-map. Actions: submit, save-draft, back.
Confirms outcome. Back navigation blocked — cannot re-enter wizard.

edges.condition: canSelectStdReceivers=true AND selected option NOT IN [std-receivers, std-receivers-ext]
canSelectStdReceivers=false OR selected option IN [std-receivers, std-receivers-ext]

light_model.note: Standard message-wizard variant only. std-receivers-intermediate and write-message skip-paths deferred.

nodes.note: SMS only in MVP. Email/eBoks/voice deferred.

blazor_routing_sketch.guard_behavior: Any step URL without valid wizard state: NavigationManager.NavigateTo('/broadcasting'). Exception: ?smsGroupId=X loads from server, then allows.

unknowns: save-draft: auto-saved on each step, or only explicitly at confirm?
by-address step: is address tree selection a sub-flow within the step, or single-page component?
LimitedUser variant: /create-message uses message-wizard-limited — separate flow or restricted version of same wizard?
write-message skip via BySmsLogs: does wizard go recipient-selection directly to confirm (no std-receivers step either)?
stencil edit: when editing existing stencil (?smsGroupId=X, isCreatingStencil=true), does wizard start at recipient-selection or confirm?
browser back button: fully blocked inside wizard, or only canDeactivate on complete step?
